Operation.Documentation: Returns Administrator Profile Info

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: HashMap<String,String> with key is column name in database table and value is the stored value
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: HashMap<String,String> with key is column name in database table and value is the stored value

Operation.Documentation: Update the basic info of the administrator account
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update the basic info of the administrator account

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean if the operation was successful or not

Parameter.Documentation: updated profile information given as a space separated string
Parameter.Documentation_plain: updated profile information given as a space separated string
Parameter.Name: info

Parameter.Name: info

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean if new account created or not

Parameter.Documentation_plain: first name of the user

Parameter.Documentation_plain: last name of the user

Parameter.Name: userType

Parameter.Name: nic

Parameter.Documentation: mobile no of the user
Parameter.Documentation_plain: mobile no of the user
Parameter.Name: mobile

Parameter.Documentation: if the user is a doctor SLMC registration number of the user else empty string ""
Parameter.Documentation_plain: if the user is a doctor SLMC registration number of the user else empty string ""
Parameter.Name: slmcReg

Parameter.Name: username

Attribute.Documentation: Fill the pie chart that contains the information of the database information
Attribute.Documentation_plain: Fill the pie chart that contains the information of the database information
Attribute.Name: pieChartType

Attribute.Documentation:
@FXML

public void fillAreaChart() {

XYChart.Series users= new XYChart.Series();

users.setName("Users");

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("8.00", 0));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("8.30", 3));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("9.00", 8));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("9.30", 10));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("10.00", 12));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("10.30", 12));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("11.00", 13));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("11.30", 13));

users.getData().add(new XYChart.Data("12.00", 11));

yAxis.setTickUnit(3);

areachart.getData().addAll(users);

}
Attribute.Name: mainTabPane

Attribute.Documentation:
@FXML Label docMsg;

@FXML Label labMsg;

@FXML Label pharmacistMsg;

@FXML Label cashierMsg;

@FXML Label receptionistMsg;

@FXML Label patientMsg;

@FXML private void sendDocMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(docMsg, data);

}

@FXML private void sendLabMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(labMsg, data);

}

@FXML private void sendPharmacistMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(pharmacistMsg, data);

}

@FXML private void sendCashierMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(cashierMsg, data);

}

@FXML private void sendReceptionistMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(receptionistMsg, data);

}

@FXML private void sendPatientMsg()

{

ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> data = null;

showPopup(patientMsg, data);

}
Attribute.Name: userType

Operation.Documentation: Loads the profile information in the UI
Operation.Documentation_plain: Loads the profile information in the UI

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a HashMap containing profile information (key-value pairs)
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a HashMap containing profile information (key-value pairs)

Operation.Documentation: Generates a bill based on the provided bill information.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Generates a bill based on the provided bill information.
Operation.Name: bill
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: bill id if the bill was successfully generated, "0" otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: bill id if the bill was successfully generated, "0" otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the details of the bill to be generated
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the details of the bill to be generated
Parameter.Name: billInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves details of a bill based on its ID.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves details of a bill based on its ID.
Operation.Name: getBillInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list containing bill details
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list containing bill details

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the bill
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the bill
Parameter.Name: billID

Operation.Documentation: Processes a refund based on the provided refund information.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Processes a refund based on the provided refund information.
Operation.Name: refund
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the refund was successful, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the refund was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the details of the refund to be processed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the details of the refund to be processed
Parameter.Name: refundInfo

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list containing the payment history of patients

Parameter.Documentation: the number of rows to fetch
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the number of rows to fetch
Parameter.Name: rows

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the update was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to be updated

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the update was successful, false otherwise

Operation.Name: doctorTimeTable
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays representing the doctor's timetable
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays representing the doctor's timetable

Operation.Documentation: Removes a time slot from the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Removes a time slot from the doctor's timetable.

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the time slot was successfully removed, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the time slot was successfully removed, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the time slot to be removed
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the time slot to be removed
Parameter.Name: id

Operation.Documentation: Adds a new time slot to the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds a new time slot to the doctor's timetable.
Operation.Name: doctorTimeTableAddSlot
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the time slot was successfully added, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the time slot was successfully added, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the day of the week
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the day of the week
Parameter.Name: day

Parameter.Documentation: the time slot to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the time slot to be added
Parameter.Name: timeSlot

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the test results

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a nested list of arrays containing patient information

Parameter.Documentation_plain: the type of search (e.g., patient ID, name)
Parameter.Name: searchType

Parameter.Documentation: the search keyword (e.g., patient ID or name)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the search keyword (e.g., patient ID or name)
Parameter.Name: searchWord

Parameter.Name: supplierID

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the doctor's schedule information

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the information of a specific patient using their patient ID.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the information of a specific patient using their patient ID.
Operation.Name: getPatientInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the patient's information
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the patient's information

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient whose information is required
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient whose information is required
Parameter.Name: patientID

Operation.Documentation: Updates the information of a specific patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the information of a specific patient.
Operation.Name: setPatientInfo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the patient information was successfully updated, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the patient information was successfully updated, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the information to update for the patient - String containing basic info separated by commas and spaces ex:"nic 9532648675,gender f,date_of_birth 19950203,address145|town1|Street1,mobile 0775123465,first_nameheshan,last_name eranga,email erangamx@gmail.com"
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the information to update for the patient - String containing basic info separated by commas and spaces ex:"nic 9532648675,gender f,date_of_birth 19950203,address145|town1|Street1,mobile 0775123465,first_nameheshan,last_name eranga,email erangamx@gmail.com"
Parameter.Name: patientInfo

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the appointment details for a patient.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the appointment details for a patient.
Operation.Name: getAppointments
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of arrays containing the appointment details
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the appointment details

Operation.Documentation: Makes an appointment for a patient with a specified doctor at a given time.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Makes an appointment for a patient with a specified doctor at a given time.
Operation.Name: makeAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the appointment was successfully made, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the appointment was successfully made, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Name: patientID

Parameter.Documentation: the ID of the doctor for the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the doctor for the appointment
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Operation.Name: makeLabAppointment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: boolean if the appointment was successfully made or not
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: boolean if the appointment was successfully made or not

Parameter.Documentation: id of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: id of the patient making the appointment
Parameter.Name: patientID

Parameter.Documentation: id of the doctor
Parameter.Documentation_plain: id of the doctor
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Parameter.Documentation: test id
Parameter.Documentation_plain: test id
Parameter.Name: testID

Parameter.Documentation: day of the week
Parameter.Documentation_plain: day of the week
Parameter.Name: day

Parameter.Documentation: time slot of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: time slot of the appointment
Parameter.Name: timeSlot

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the available appointment times for a specified doctor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the available appointment times for a specified doctor.

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of arrays containing the available times for the doctor's appointments

Parameter.Documentation_plain: the ID of the doctor for whom the available appointment times are needed
Parameter.Name: doctorID

Operation.Name: getDoctorSummary
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about all the Doctors in the hospital{doctorID, specializesAreas,doctorFirstName, doctorLastName,availableDays, days}
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about all the Doctors in the hospital{doctorID, specializesAreas,doctorFirstName, doctorLastName,availableDays, days}

Operation.Name: getCurrentlyAvailableDoctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about the Doctors currently available at the time
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with details about the Doctors currently available at the time

Operation.Name: getConsultationAreas
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<String> consultation Areas of the doctor in the hospital
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> consultation Areas of the doctor in the hospital

Operation.Name: getDoctor
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with list of doctor's with registration numbers and names
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<ArrayList<String>> with list of doctor's with registration numbers and names

Parameter.Documentation: doctor consultation area
Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctor consultation area
Parameter.Name: ConsultationArea

Operation.Name: getDoctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: names of the doctors
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: names of the doctors

Operation.Name: getAvailableDays

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> of days that doctor available in the hospital

Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctors registration number
Parameter.Name: registrationNo

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ArrayList<String> of Doctors available time

Parameter.Documentation_plain: doctors registration number
Parameter.Name: registrationNo

Parameter.Documentation: day selected for the Appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: day selected for the Appointment
Parameter.Name: day

metaDataHash

Operation.Documentation: Constructor to initialize DatabaseOperator object.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Constructor to initialize DatabaseOperator object.
Operation.Name: DatabaseOperator

Operation.Documentation: Constructor to initialize DatabaseOperator with specific database class nameand connection string.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Constructor to initialize DatabaseOperator with specific database class nameand connection string.
Operation.Name: DatabaseOperator

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the database class (e.g., "org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver")
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the database class (e.g., "org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver")
Parameter.Name: databaseClassName

Parameter.Documentation: the connection string to the database
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the connection string to the database
Parameter.Name: connection

Operation.Documentation: Connects to the database using the provided username and password.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Connects to the database using the provided username and password.
Operation.Name: connect

Parameter.Documentation: the username for the database connection
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the username for the database connection
Parameter.Name: userName

Parameter.Documentation: the password for the database connection
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the password for the database connection
Parameter.Name: password

Operation.Documentation: Connects to the database using the config username and password
Operation.Documentation_plain: Connects to the database using the config username and password
Operation.Name: connect

Operation.Documentation: Closes the current database connection.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Closes the current database connection.
Operation.Name: close

Operation.Documentation: Creates a new database with the given name.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Creates a new database with the given name.
Operation.Name: createDatabase

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the database to be created
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the database to be created
Parameter.Name: databaseName

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves a list of all available databases.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves a list of all available databases.
Operation.Name: showDatabases
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: an ArrayList of database names
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: an ArrayList of database names

Operation.Documentation: Selects the specified database to use.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Selects the specified database to use.
Operation.Name: useDatabase

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the database to select
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the database to select
Parameter.Name: databaseName

Operation.Documentation: Connects and use database with config data
Operation.Documentation_plain: Connects and use database with config data
Operation.Name: connectAndUseDatabase

Operation.Documentation: Creates a new table in the current database with the given table name andcolumn headers.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Creates a new table in the current database with the given table name andcolumn headers.
Operation.Name: createTable

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table to be created
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table to be created
Parameter.Name: tableName

Parameter.Documentation: the headers of the columns in the table
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the headers of the columns in the table
Parameter.Name: columnHeaders

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves a list of all tables in the current database.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves a list of all tables in the current database.
Operation.Name: showTables
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: an ArrayList of table names
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: an ArrayList of table names

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the metadata of the specified table, including column names anddata types.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the metadata of the specified table, including column names anddata types.
Operation.Name: showTableMetaData
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of metadata for the table (column names, data types, etc.)
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of metadata for the table (column names, data types, etc.)

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table whose metadata is to be retrieved
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table whose metadata is to be retrieved
Parameter.Name: tableName

Operation.Documentation: Adds a new row to the specified table.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Adds a new row to the specified table.
Operation.Name: addTableRow
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: true if the row was added successfully, false otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the row was added successfully, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table to which the row will be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table to which the row will be added
Parameter.Name: table

Parameter.Documentation: the data to be inserted into the row
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the data to be inserted into the row
Parameter.Name: tableData

Operation.Documentation: Deletes a row from the specified table, selecting the row based on a columnwith String data.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Deletes a row from the specified table, selecting the row based on a columnwith String data.
Operation.Name: deleteTableRow

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table from which the row will be deleted
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table from which the row will be deleted
Parameter.Name: tableName

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the column to identify the row
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the column to identify the row
Parameter.Name: ColumnName

Parameter.Documentation: the value of the column to match for deletion
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the value of the column to match for deletion
Parameter.Name: fieldValue

Operation.Documentation: Deletes a row from the specified table, selecting the row based on a columnwith int data.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Deletes a row from the specified table, selecting the row based on a columnwith int data.
Operation.Name: deleteTableRow

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table from which the row will be deleted
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table from which the row will be deleted
Parameter.Name: tableName

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the column to identify the row
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the column to identify the row
Parameter.Name: ColumnName

Parameter.Documentation: the value of the column to match for deletion
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the value of the column to match for deletion
Parameter.Name: fieldValue

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the data of the specified table.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the data of the specified table.
Operation.Name: showTableData
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of lists representing the table data
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of lists representing the table data

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table whose data is to be retrieved
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table whose data is to be retrieved
Parameter.Name: tableName

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the data of the specified table, only for the selected columns.

Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table whose data is to be retrieved
Parameter.Name: tableName

Parameter.Documentation: a comma-separated list of column names to be included in the result
Parameter.Documentation_plain: a comma-separated list of column names to be included in the result
Parameter.Name: columNames

Operation.Documentation: Retrieves the data of the specified table, only for the selected rows andcolumns.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Retrieves the data of the specified table, only for the selected rows andcolumns.
Operation.Name: showTableData
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: a list of lists representing the filtered table data
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of lists representing the filtered table data

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table whose data is to be retrieved
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table whose data is to be retrieved
Parameter.Name: tableName

Parameter.Documentation_plain: a comma-separated list of column names to be included in the result
Parameter.Name: columNames

Parameter.Documentation: the conditions to filter the rows
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the conditions to filter the rows
Parameter.Name: rowsAttributes

Operation.Documentation: Performs a custom selection operation on a table using the provided SQLquery.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Performs a custom selection operation on a table using the provided SQLquery.
Operation.Name: customSelection

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: a list of lists containing the selected data

Parameter.Documentation: the SQL query for selection
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the SQL query for selection
Parameter.Name: sql

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: true if the insertion was successful, false otherwise

Parameter.Documentation: the SQL query for insertion
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the SQL query for insertion
Parameter.Name: sql

Parameter.Documentation_plain: the SQL query for deletion

Operation.Documentation: Deletes the specified table from the database.

Operation.Name: deleteTable

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the table to be deleted
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the table to be deleted
Parameter.Name: tableName

Operation.Documentation: The main() method is ignored in correctly deployed JavaFX application.main() serves only as fallback in case the application can not belaunched through deployment artifacts, e.g., in IDEs with limited FXsupport. NetBeans ignores main().
Operation.Documentation_plain: The main() method is ignored in correctly deployed JavaFX application.main() serves only as fallback in case the application can not belaunched through deployment artifacts, e.g., in IDEs with limited FXsupport. NetBeans ignores main().
Operation.Name: main

Parameter.Documentation: the command line arguments
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the command line arguments
Parameter.Name: args

Operation.Documentation_plain: Constructor to initialize the User object with a specified username.
Operation.Name: User

Parameter.Documentation: the username to initialize the User object
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the username to initialize the User object
Parameter.Name: username

Operation.Name: NIC
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: empty ArrayList<Integer> with birth year, days and gender respectivelyArrayList<Integer> is empty if the string is not an nic no
